issues.comment: Removed AdminRoles.ADMIN from hasOneAdminRole() check but kept AdminRoles.MANAGE_USERS and AdminRoles.VIEW_USERS, potentially denying access to users with ADMIN role who don't have the specific sub-roles, causing authorization failures.
Removed `.filter(usersEvaluator::canView)` from the user search stream, causing the method to return users that the evaluator cannot view, bypassing access control checks.

Changed filter logic from `canViewGlobal || auth.groups().canView(g)` to just `auth.groups()::canView`, removing the global view permission check and potentially making previously accessible groups inaccessible.

Changed filter logic from `canViewGlobal || groupsEvaluator.canView(g)` to just `groupsEvaluator::canView`, removing the global view permission check and potentially making previously accessible groups inaccessible.
Removed condition `!auth.users().canView()` that previously guarded setting session attribute, now always sets UserModel.GROUPS attribute when groupIds is not empty, changing authorization behavior.
Removed condition `!auth.users().canView()` that previously guarded setting session attribute, now always sets UserModel.GROUPS attribute when groupIds is not empty, changing authorization behavior.
